description: Fix critical wiring issues identified by architect/security/code/critic reviews

stories.title: Wire LLM into BaseAgent
acceptanceCriteria: BaseAgent has protected callLLM(systemPrompt, userPrompt, complexity?) method that calls router.route()
npx vitest run passes all existing tests

stories.title: Wire Sandbox Security (Interceptor + PolicyEngine into Executor)
acceptanceCriteria: SandboxExecutor.execute() calls CommandInterceptor.intercept() before spawning process
Blocked commands return exitCode 126 without spawning shell
Secret env vars stripped from child process env

stories.title: Build Orchestration Loop in Engine
acceptanceCriteria: AgendaSubmitted listener spawns agents via AgentFactory
Engine calls agent.setRouter() on created agents
Engine exposes runAgentCycle(projectId) that drives think/act

stories.title: Fix CLI Submit + DebateProtocol + PhaseManager
acceptanceCriteria: CLI submit does NOT call engine.stop() after submitting
DebateProtocol uses real BaseAgent think() for deliberation
PhaseManager.startPhase() does NOT emit ErrorOccurred for info messages
npx vitest run passes all tests
